name: YouTrackConnector
description: Connects to the JetBrains YouTrack REST API (Issues, Projects, Users, Boards, Sprints, Articles, Comments, Tags, Time Tracking) using a permanent token. Supports issue CRUD, comments, agile boards, knowledge-base articles, and KB sync of issues.

install_fields.label: YouTrack Base URL
install_fields.help: Per-tenant YouTrack instance URL. Cloud: https://{instance}.youtrack.cloud. Self-hosted: https://youtrack.example.com. The connector appends /api automatically.

install_fields.label: Permanent Token
install_fields.help: Generate at YouTrack -> Profile -> Account Security -> Permanent Tokens. Sent as `Authorization: Bearer <perm:...>`. Tokens start with `perm:`.

install_fields.label: Default Project ID
install_fields.help: Optional. If set, sync() filters by this project and create_issue uses it as a fallback when no project_id is supplied.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Soft client-side cap on requests/minute against the YouTrack API.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates base_url + permanent_token and verifies the token by calling GET /users/me?fields=login.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Probes GET /users/me?fields=login to verify the permanent token is still valid.

apis.name: Get Current User
apis.description: GET /users/me - returns the user the token authenticates as.

apis.name: List Users
apis.description: GET /users - list users with optional search query and pagination.

apis.name: Get User
apis.description: GET /users/{id} - return a single user by ID.

apis.name: List Projects
apis.description: GET /admin/projects - list projects visible to the token.

apis.name: Get Project
apis.description: GET /admin/projects/{id} - return a single project by ID.

apis.name: List Issues
apis.description: GET /issues - search issues using the YouTrack query language.

apis.name: Get Issue
apis.description: GET /issues/{id} - fetch a single issue by ID or readable ID.

apis.name: Create Issue
apis.description: POST /issues - create an issue in the supplied project with summary and optional description/customFields.

apis.name: Update Issue
apis.description: POST /issues/{id} - update mutable issue fields. Only supplied fields are sent.

apis.name: Delete Issue
apis.description: DELETE /issues/{id} - permanently delete an issue. Requires delete permission in the project.

apis.name: Add Comment
apis.description: POST /issues/{id}/comments - add a comment to an issue.

apis.name: List Comments
apis.description: GET /issues/{id}/comments - list comments on an issue.

apis.name: List Tags
apis.description: GET /issueTags - list account-wide tags.

apis.name: List Time Tracking Work Items
apis.description: GET /issues/{id}/timeTracking/workItems - list logged work items on an issue.

apis.name: List Agile Boards
apis.description: GET /agiles - list agile boards visible to the token.

apis.name: List Sprints
apis.description: GET /agiles/{agileId}/sprints - list sprints on an agile board.

apis.name: List Articles
apis.description: GET /articles - list YouTrack knowledge-base articles.

apis.name: Sync Issues
apis.description: Pages through /issues (optionally filtered by default_project_id and since) and ingests each issue as a NormalizedDocument into the Shielva knowledge base.
